findings.evidence: Grep hits show `complexLinearPart` at line 153 and only `complexLinearPart_add`/`complexAntilinearPart_add` at lines 181/189; Mathlib has composition-as-linear-map infrastructure (`Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/BilinearMap.lean:184` `LinearMap.lcomp`, `:441` `LinearMap.llcomp`) suitable for this Hom-level linear operator.
findings.fix: Define the parts first as linear maps `(V →ₗ[ℝ] W) →ₗ[ℝ] (V →ₗ[ℝ] W)` (or add `complexLinearPartLinearMap`/`complexAntilinearPartLinearMap` and derive the current application API from them), including the smul behavior and the projection/decomposition statements at that level.
findings.issue: `complexLinearPart` and `complexAntilinearPart` are defined only as functions of `F`, with only additivity lemmas at lines 181 and 189, even though these are ℝ-linear projections on the Hom module `(V →ₗ[ℝ] W)`.

summary: The decomposition is at the right mathematical scope, but the main operators are exposed below the natural linear-map level.
